schema.document: Root keys: version (number), schema (object, documentation only), blueprint_ref (string, optional pointer), items (array). Validators must allow blueprint_ref.

items.title: Phase 1 — Schemas + ingestion (append-only POST /api/events)
items.bound: shared/schemas + ingest path; DB canonical_events; strict validation, unknown fields rejected; blueprint §2 (services/ingest layout), §4 Event Schema, §14 API, §17 phase 1
items.last_note: POST /api/events + /api/ingest: Zod strict + persistFluencyEventRecord → Prisma canonical_events when DATABASE_URL set (org from JWT/x-org-id). Readers merge DB + memory via loadFluencyEventRecords.

items.title: Phase 2 — Execution + trace reconstruction
items.bound: trace_engine + lifecycle reducer; ordering, retries, tool/step grouping; blueprint §5–6, §17 phase 2
items.last_note: trace_engine + execution_lifecycle + Jest contracts/trace tests green; blueprint target services/* layout still optional incremental migration

items.title: Phase 3 — FSC eligibility + minimum signal gates (hard pre-classify)
items.bound: PRD §18 FSC + §20 min signal + §21 steps 1–2 only (not full classify); map to INCOMPLETE_EXECUTION / INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL; code: services/gates or execution_disclosure; blueprint §7 FSC, §8 Min Signal (§12 suppression wiring continues in phase-05)
items.last_note: fluency_execution_gates.ts: evaluateFluencyExecutionGates → FSC + min signal; attachPhase2ToTraces skips classify when gates fail; disclosure reasons incomplete_execution / insufficient_signal + fsc:* / min_signal:*; observability_aggregate aligned

items.title: Phase 4 — Signal detection + threshold calibration (internal numeric)
items.bound: execution_signals + workflow_baseline: rolling N=200 per workflow, P25/P75; categories LOW/NORMAL/HIGH internal; no numeric API leak; blueprint §9–10
items.last_note: workflow_baseline: iteration_low from P25; latency P75 unchanged; WORKFLOW_BASELINE_MAX_SAMPLE_EXECUTIONS (default 200) newest-first cap per workflow

items.title: Phase 5 — Deterministic pattern classification + suppression pipeline
items.bound: behavioral_patterns + suppression: priority order, mutual exclusion, ambiguity → AMBIGUITY; no inference/ML on product path; blueprint §11–12
items.last_note: Fluency path: fluency-pattern-suppression.ts maps signals → classifyBehaviorPattern + evaluateSuppression; attachPhase2ToTraces + observability_aggregate + disclosure (classification_ambiguity + suppression:* diagnostics). Legacy classifyExecutionPattern kept for direct unit tests / doc parity.

items.title: Phase 6 — Workflow aggregation + observability API
items.bound: observability_aggregate + GET /api/observability/:orgId; workflow-level only; cohort suppression; blueprint §13–14
items.last_note: Rollup per-execution path now uses same FSC/min gates + evaluateExecutionDisclosure as traces; still no numeric baseline leak

items.title: Phase 7 — Tests, harness verify, governance regression
items.bound: harness/scripts/verify.sh; harness/feature_list.json passes per docs/agent/EVALUATION.md; blueprint §16 + forbidden-field API tests
items.last_note: npm run test:ci --workspace backend; ./harness/scripts/verify.sh; python3 scripts/ci_v1_governance_gates.py; backend/tests/fluency_execution_gates.test.ts

items.title: VBD numerical-precision implementation and non-admissible precision canaries
items.bound: Synthetic-only inference/, internal confidence-engine bridge tests only if required, and verified OpenSpec/docs/status: complete task 2.6 by implementing conditional_normal_mixture_quantile_v2 with exact binary64 oracles, centered 4x20k retained/5k tune/.999/adapt_full NUTS settings, five separate MCSE fields for every required parameter, fixed 4,000-state PPC selector, 7,200-second primary bundle-child timeout, old-lineage rejection, and exact six-/twelve-group full-setting precision canaries under the frozen smoke seeds; run both canaries only after focused/full verification and keep them permanent non-evidence HOLD; preserve model, priors, estimand, acceptance seeds, every statistical threshold, 30-bundle universe, and fail-closed behavior; no replacement S/F, acceptance seed, concordance bundle, acceptance canary, replicated study, real/customer/live data, public schema, route, UI, persistence, connector, export, customer output, confidence/probability, ROI, causality, productivity, ranking, new event/reason, promotion, task 3.1+, or parent 5.6 completion
items.last_note: Paused on qualifying frozen-contract blocker 2026-07-17 before any precision canary: direct evaluation showed one normalized frequency weight underflows at log range ~793.7 and Breadth raw importance weights span beyond any single finite-positive binary64 scaling. CODE review correctly rejected silently deleting those components because the amended contract says nonpositive weights HOLD while retaining the unchanged 8,192-point design. Canary-forgery and exact seed-plus-scenario routing blockers were repaired in 929bacf1 and focused tests pass. Task 2.6, both canaries, replacement S/F, concordance, and evidence remain incomplete. Smallest next decision is a separately authorized docs/OpenSpec representability amendment; do not add a weight floor, change Sobol points, lower gates, rotate seeds, or run canaries under the current contract.
